Birmingham's Most Trusted Premium Removal Service

From your first box to the last piece of furniture — The Royals Removals delivers a stress-free, carefully handled move you can rely on. Serving Birmingham and surrounding areas with unmatched care and professionalism.

  • ✓ Fully insured & vetted professional team
  • ✓ Free no-obligation quotes in minutes
  • ✓ Same-day response & flexible move dates
  • ✓ Careful handling & damage protection guarantee

Simple Process

How It Works

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Moving with The Royals Removals is easy, transparent, and stress-free.

01

Get Your Free Quote

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Fill in our simple 2-minute form and receive a personalised, transparent quote within minutes.

02

Book Your Move

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Choose your preferred date and confirm your booking with a small deposit and no hidden fees.

03

We Do the Heavy Lifting

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Our professional team arrives on time, handles everything carefully, and keeps you informed throughout.

04

Settle Into Your New Home

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Relax while we unload and position your belongings exactly where you want them.

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

How quickly will I receive my quote? +
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. You will typically receive your personalised quote within 10–15 minutes of submitting the form. Our team is available 7 days a week.
Are you insured for damage? +
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Yes, we are fully insured with comprehensive goods in transit cover up to £50,000. Your belongings are in safe hands.
Do you offer packing services? +
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Yes! We offer a full professional packing service. Our team will carefully pack and label all of your belongings using premium materials.
Can I move on a weekend or bank holiday? +
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Absolutely. We operate 7 days a week including weekends and most bank holidays to fit your schedule.
How far in advance should I book? +
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. We recommend booking at least 2–4 weeks in advance for peak periods to secure your preferred date. However, we do accommodate last-minute moves when availability permits.
Do you cover areas outside Birmingham? +
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Yes, we serve all surrounding areas including Solihull, Coventry, Wolverhampton, Walsall and many more. Contact us if you're unsure whether we cover your area.

Ready for a Royal Move?

Join hundreds of satisfied Birmingham families. Get your free, no-obligation quote in under 2 minutes. Our team responds in 10–15 minutes.
